goal: Find the three most visited websites in the world and return each one with its estimated monthly visitor count.
final_output:
The three most visited websites in the world are:
1. Google.com: approximately 83.9 billion monthly visits
2. YouTube.com: approximately 32.7 billion monthly visits
3. Facebook.com: approximately 20.0 billion monthly visits
(Source: Similarweb, 2024 rankings)
